name: Left Hook
description: LEFT HOOK! It'll knock you out!!!

name: Really Cool Sparrow
description: The REALLY COOL part is how this Sparrow saves cost, complexity, and mass by ditching the old, outdated method of attaching so-called 'thruster engines' to spaceships in favor of something which provides both propulsion AND defense - guns.
_internalId: Tau's Deeply Stupid Ships/TausDeeplyStupidShips::Really Cool Sparrow

name: Efficiency's Favored Child
description: This ship is an almost entirely custom build - it maintains the exterior form of the Osprey, but is built with Hai technology bringing its durability in line with a Sea Scorpion. It has also had its thrusters ripped out entirely, mount and all to be replaced with rear-facing guns. This brilliant engineering decision allows it to use some of the most efficient engines in the galaxy - Skipper Railguns. Enjoy the savings in outfit space, heat, and energy afforded by 100% all-natural recoil-based thrust.
_internalId: Tau's Deeply Stupid Ships/TausDeeplyStupidShips::Efficiency's Favored Child

name: Merganser Sidestep Special
description: This poor Merganser has been refitted with alien technology and had a crude cannon installed sideways.
_internalId: Tau's Deeply Stupid Ships/TausDeeplyStupidShips::Merganser Sidestep Special

name: Broadside
description: This Skein has had its fighter bays converted back into cargo holds, but kept the carrier form. This is to enable use of the ill-advised Boxwing Cannon.

name: Combat Microdrone
description: Combat Microdrones are disposable units meant to be deployed and forgotten. They do not have reactors or shields and only the minimum viable hull plating. This model is equipped with a Gatling Snubnose to deliver high amounts of hull damage in its short lifespan. 	Drones do not come equipped with a hyperdrive. You cannot carry a drone unless you have a ship in your fleet with a drone bay.

name: Arby's
description: The Arby's is a light carrier, shamelessly plagarized from the Lionheart Aerie. Its fighter bays have been modified to house ten microdrones, and its offensive complement reduced to accomodate.

name: Galaga
description: Southbound Shipyards' Fury is a scary little interceptor. The gun ports on this one have been spread for reasons unknown to modern science.

name: Marder Vanguard
description: The Vanguard is Syndicated Systems' crapbucket budget heavy warship. This one has been "improved" by spreading the gun ports outward. It makes a pretty light show, at least.

name: Ultra-Sick Turbo Flivver
_internalId: Tau's Deeply Stupid Ships/TausDeeplyStupidShips::Ultra-Sick Turbo Flivver

name: Ultra-Sick Turbo Flivver DEBUG
_internalId: Tau's Deeply Stupid Ships/TausDeeplyStupidShips::Ultra-Sick Turbo Flivver DEBUG

name: Rav
description: Uncle Trusty thought the Raven was very cool, but would be -even cooler- if the wings weren't so long. So he had them chopped off. Plagued by both energy and heat problems, but sacrifices had to be made for -the aesthetic-

name: Pigeon
description: Okay look. Let's get this out in the open - this was 100% a scaling mistake in CAD. But here it is. Uncle Trusty says it is solid. You can trust him.
